page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Extract 454 Genome Sequencer reads from a SFF file and convert them into a FASTQ formatted output
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Extract 454 Genome Sequencer reads from a SFF file and convert them into a FASTQ formatted output
page_metadata.biotools__summary: The program extracts read information from a SFF file, produced by the 454 genome sequencer, and outputs the sequences and quality scores in a FASTQ format.
